creator: freebsd@gregv.net
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #2)

I got the Python error with my test build as well.  Looks like the issue is that solenv/bin/pack_images.py uses #!/usr/bin/env python.  I could patch it to use python2, but I instead added python:lang/python to BUILD_DEPENDS, with this it builds cleanly for me.
